name: Ottoman - Cloud Island™ Gray Shadow
description: Whether you're nesting before baby is born or looking for a way to add some functional style as they're growing, this Ottoman from cloud island™ is the perfect furniture solution. This pouf-style ottoman is made with a gray fabric in a knit design that creates stylish texture and a soft exterior. With a lightweight design that makes it easy to move around as needed, this knitted pouf ottoman is perfect for placing in a nursery — its soft and comfy so baby can move around safely and even feel its unique texture with their little hands.
